skills.name: Node.js / Bunjs
skills.glossary: Tech Lead with 6+ years experience. Architected core microservices at Oben Electric, Diagnostics Labs module at Visit Health, and TapTap ERP at Kabra Logitech.
skills.description: Event-driven, non-blocking I/O runtime. Expert in building high-throughput services, handling streams, cluster setups, and custom server architectures for EV telemetry and healthcare platforms.

skills.name: Redis
skills.glossary: Used extensively at Oben Electric and Visit Health for caching strategies, session management, and BullMQ background task processing.
skills.description: In-memory data structure store used as a database, cache, and message broker. Advanced usage in pub/sub patterns, distributed locking, and high-availability caching strategies.

skills.name: Microservices
skills.glossary: Designed and scaled microservices powering customer applications, web platforms, and internal dashboards at Oben Electric with sub-second API latency.
skills.description: Designing distributed systems, defining service boundaries, inter-service communication (REST, gRPC, event-driven), and managing service registries for high-scale EV and healthcare systems.

skills.name: Saga Pattern
skills.glossary: Applied Saga choreography/orchestration pattern in distributed systems to maintain eventual consistency across microservices.
skills.description: Designing distributed transactions in microservices architectures using choreography or orchestration approaches to maintain data consistency without 2PC locks.

skills.name: Event Loop
skills.glossary: Expert knowledge of macro/microtask queues, execution stack, and performance tuning for high-throughput backend services.
skills.description: Deep understanding of Node.js event loop phases, microtasks/macrotasks scheduling, call stack execution, and performance tuning to prevent blocking operations.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.glossary: Full-stack scripting and advanced ES6+ features across all professional roles since 2019, including async concurrency and memory profile optimizations.
skills.description: Advanced ES6+ JavaScript, asynchronous programming (Promises/async-await), closures, scoping, prototypes, and memory management for performant server-side applications.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.glossary: Utilized as primary backend language at Oben Electric, Visit Health, and Kabra Logitech to write strictly typed, modular, and maintainable services.
skills.description: Strictly typed superset of JS. Strong knowledge of custom types, generics, interfaces, and decorators for scalable, enterprise-grade codebases.

skills.name: System Design
skills.glossary: Designed scalable systems handling terabytes of EV telemetry data and distributed healthcare integrations with high availability and low latency.
skills.description: Designing highly scalable, available, and fault-tolerant architectures. Load balancing, horizontal scaling, database sharding, and caching for mission-critical systems.

skills.name: SOLID Principles
skills.glossary: Core engineering practices applied across Oben Electric and Visit Health codebases to ensure highly decoupled and testable service modules.
skills.description: Designing clean, modular, and maintainable software based on Single Responsibility, Open/Closed, Liskov Substitution, Interface Segregation, and Dependency Inversion principles.

skills.name: Data Structures
skills.glossary: In-depth computer science grounding. Qualified GATE 2020. Strong application of graphs and spatial search trees in geospatial routing.
skills.description: Deep understanding of linear and non-linear structures, binary trees, heaps, graphs, hashing, and complexity analysis applied to real-world routing problems.

skills.name: Algorithms
skills.glossary: Robust foundation in algorithmic complexity. Applied to vehicle routing, route optimization, and data deduplication in ERP and IoT tracking platforms.
skills.description: Asymptotic analysis, divide & conquer, greedy methods, dynamic programming, graph traversal, and complexity classes (P vs NP) for optimization challenges.

skills.name: Operating Systems
skills.glossary: Strong understanding of memory allocation, process scheduling, and concurrency, applied when optimizing Node.js clustered servers and IoT device interactions.
skills.description: CPU scheduling, process synchronization, memory management (paging/virtual memory), file systems, and deadlocks in production environments.

skills.name: Databases (Theory)
skills.glossary: Deep understanding of relational algebra, B-trees, normalization, transaction isolation levels (ACID), and concurrency protocols.
skills.description: Relational model algebra, normalization theory (up to BCNF), transaction concurrency control, and crash recovery mechanisms.

skills.name: OOPs
skills.glossary: Design patterns, inheritance, and dependency injection implemented in TypeScript and Go microservices across Oben Electric, Visit Health, and Kabra.
skills.description: Core Object-Oriented Programming principles including inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, abstraction, and object relationships for modular design.

skills.name: QuestDB
skills.glossary: Utilized at Oben Electric for high-throughput time-series ingestion and real-time SQL analysis of connected electric motorcycle telemetry.
skills.description: Fast time-series database designed for high-throughput ingestion and real-time SQL analytics on vehicle telemetry and IoT sensor data.

skills.name: ClickHouse
skills.glossary: Used at Oben Electric for analytical reporting and processing of large-scale, historical vehicle telemetry datasets.
skills.description: Fast, column-oriented database management system for online analytical processing (OLAP) on massive telemetry datasets.

skills.name: Kafka
skills.glossary: Architected event-driven data streaming pipelines to handle real-time vehicle metrics ingestion and processing.
skills.description: Distributed event streaming platform. Architected event-driven pipelines for telemetry ingestion, log aggregation, and pub/sub communication.

skills.name: MQTT
skills.glossary: Implemented secure MQTT telemetry transmission and communication protocols for Oben Electric's connected vehicle systems.
skills.description: Lightweight publish/subscribe messaging protocol optimized for resource-constrained telemetry devices in EV systems.

skills.name: Uber H3
skills.glossary: Utilized Uber H3 hexagonal spatial indexing at Oben Electric for mapping vehicle telemetry, geofencing, and proximity analytics.
skills.description: Hexagonal hierarchical spatial index. Used for geographic visualization, vehicle location mapping, and efficient telemetry queries.

skills.name: BullMQ
skills.glossary: Implemented BullMQ at Oben Electric to queue asynchronous background jobs, retry failed API requests, and rate-limit internal tasks.
skills.description: Redis-backed message queue for handling asynchronous jobs, rate-limiting, delayed jobs, and background task processing in Node.js.

skills.name: Payment Integrations
skills.glossary: Designed transaction and refund workflows integrating Razorpay, CashFree, PayPal, and Pine Labs at Visit Health and Oben Electric.
skills.description: Integrating payment processors like PayPal, Pine Labs, CashFree and Razorpay, handling complex webhook flows, subscription lifecycles, and transaction security.

skills.name: Docker / Podman
skills.glossary: Containerized Node.js and TypeScript microservices for local staging and Kubernetes cluster deployments across all roles.
skills.description: Containerizing applications, writing optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles, managing container orchestration, and volume mounting.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.glossary: Designed schemas, optimized slow queries, and managed indexes for Visit Health diagnostics services and pixelMind systems.
skills.description: Relational database design, writing complex SQL queries, index optimization, execution plan analysis, and connection pooling.

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.glossary: Primary NoSQL DB across Kabra (TapTap ERP), PixelMind and Oben Electric. Developed aggregation pipelines for driver and diagnostic booking reports.
skills.description: NoSQL document storage, schema design for high growth, aggregation pipelines, replica sets, and indexing strategies.

skills.name: AWS Core Services
skills.glossary: Managed application deployments and monitoring using EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch, and IAM at Kabra Logitech and Oben Electric.
skills.description: Deploying apps using EC2, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch, and Lambda. Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) integration.

skills.name: Computer Networks
skills.glossary: OSI model, TCP/IP protocols, and network security concepts applied when configuring secure local microservice environments.
skills.description: OSI stack layers, TCP/IP protocols, routing algorithms (OSPF, BGP), congestion control, and network security fundamentals.

skills.name: Computer Architecture
skills.glossary: Understanding of memory hierarchy and instruction sets, applied when optimizing server scripts and cache setups.
skills.description: Instruction pipelining, addressing modes, memory hierarchy, cache optimization, and I/O interface design.

skills.name: DuckDB
skills.glossary: Used for serverless, low-overhead analytics on local CSV/Parquet files to generate business intelligence metrics.
skills.description: Embedded analytical database engine designed for fast local analytical queries and serverless data processing.

skills.name: Go
skills.glossary: Contributed compatibility patches to Liftbridge (Go-based Kafka alternative) and developed performant backend utility scripts.
skills.description: Statically typed compiled language used for writing lightweight microservices and low-overhead CLI tools.

skills.name: Ollama & vLLM
skills.glossary: Deployed and integrated local models (vLLM/Ollama) to build private, low-latency text-generation agents and text embeddings.
skills.description: Running, scaling, and optimizing large language models (LLMs) locally, generating text and managing vector embeddings.

skills.name: RAG
skills.glossary: Built retrieval-augmented pipelines integrating vector databases and local LLMs to ground agent replies on internal documents.
skills.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technique that improves the accuracy and reliability of language models by grounding their responses in external knowledge bases.

skills.name: Liftbridge
skills.glossary: Contributed Termux/Android compatibility patches to the Liftbridge open-source project to run event streams on mobile devices.
skills.description: Lightweight distributed message log providing queueing and streaming. Contributed porting patches for Termux/Android.

skills.name: Python
skills.glossary: Used Python for data engineering scripting, ETL pipelines using Apache Airflow, and running local AI model evaluation tasks.
skills.description: Writing automation scripts, basic data visualization, and data analysis using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.

skills.name: Kubernetes
skills.glossary: Designed and managed Kubernetes deployment configs and service definitions for microservice environments.
skills.description: Container orchestration, writing basic YAML configs for deployments, services, ingress, and configmaps.

skills.name: GraphQL
skills.glossary: Designed unified GraphQL gateway schemas to fetch patient diagnostics and booking histories from diverse diagnostic providers.
skills.description: Designing schemas, writing resolvers, optimizing query execution, and integrating Apollo Client/Server for flexible data fetching.

skills.name: CI/CD Pipelines
skills.glossary: Set up GitHub Actions pipelines for automated code linting, unit testing, and deployment triggers.
skills.description: Setting up build and deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions and GitLab CI, auto-testing, and security scanning.

skills.name: WebSockets
skills.glossary: Built real-time Queue Management Systems (QMS) and live vehicle tracking dashboards using native WebSockets and socket connection pooling.
skills.description: Implementing real-time bi-directional communication, socket connection management, heartbeat mechanisms, and scalability.

skills.name: Compiler Design
skills.glossary: Academic foundation. Comprehension of parsing, AST creation, and lexical analysis, aiding in custom query parser construction.
skills.description: Lexical analysis, parsing techniques (LL/LR parser construction), syntax-directed translation, and intermediate code generation.

skills.name: Microprocessors
skills.glossary: Intel 8085 architecture knowledge, assembly programming, and interrupts, applied when interfacing with telemetry device firmware.
skills.description: 8085 architecture, instruction sets, memory/peripheral interfacing, assembly programming, and interrupts.

skills.name: Vector DB
skills.glossary: Deployed vector databases to store, index, and query high-dimensional embeddings for semantic search in RAG applications.
skills.description: Specialized databases for storing and querying high-dimensional vector embeddings in AI/ML search applications.

skills.name: Technical Mentorship
skills.glossary: Mentored junior developers at Oben Electric and Visit Health, conducting code reviews and pair programming sessions to elevate team velocity.
skills.description: Guiding junior engineers through complex architectural decisions, conducting thorough code reviews, and fostering a culture of continuous learning and technical excellence.

skills.name: Agile Leadership
skills.glossary: Led sprint planning and retrospectives for cross-functional teams at Oben Electric, ensuring alignment between business goals and technical delivery.
skills.description: Facilitating agile ceremonies, managing backlogs, breaking down epics into actionable tasks, and ensuring transparent communication across stakeholders.

skills.name: System Architecture Decisions
skills.glossary: Made critical technology choices for Oben Electric's EV platform, selecting QuestDB, Kafka, and Microservices to handle scale.
skills.description: Evaluating trade-offs between technologies, creating RFCs for major architectural changes, and taking ownership of long-term system health and scalability.

skills.name: Cross-Team Collaboration
skills.glossary: Collaborated with hardware, firmware, and product teams at Oben Electric to define telemetry APIs and vehicle data contracts.
skills.description: Bridging gaps between backend, frontend, hardware, and product teams to ensure seamless integration and aligned technical specifications.

skills.name: Code Quality Standards
skills.glossary: Established coding standards, linting rules, and testing protocols across multiple startups to reduce technical debt and improve maintainability.
skills.description: Defining and enforcing engineering best practices, setting up automated quality gates, and championing test-driven development (TDD) within the team.

skills.name: Apache Airflow
skills.glossary: Orchestrated complex ETL pipelines at Oben Electric for aggregating vehicle telemetry data and generating daily business intelligence reports.
skills.description: Programmatic workflow orchestration platform. Designing DAGs for data ingestion, transformation, and scheduled reporting with dependency management and retry logic.

skills.name: k6
skills.glossary: Integrated k6 into CI/CD pipelines at Visit Health to validate API performance thresholds before production deployments, preventing latency regressions.
skills.description: Developer-centric load testing tool. Writing JavaScript-based test scripts to simulate user traffic, measure RPS/latency, and identify bottlenecks in microservices.

skills.name: Prometheus & Grafana
skills.glossary: Built real-time monitoring dashboards for Oben Electric's EV fleet services, tracking API error rates, queue depths, and system resource utilization.
skills.description: Metrics collection and visualization stack. Configuring exporters, writing PromQL queries, and creating alerting rules for proactive incident response.
